mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, template_code, template_name, disease_code, department, template_schema, status, version_no, created_by, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM report_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_template ( tenant_id, template_code, template_name, disease_code, department, template_schema, status, version_no, created_by ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{diseaseCode}, #{department}, #{templateSchema, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{versionNo}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE report_template SET template_code = #{templateCode}, template_name = #{templateName}, disease_code = #{diseaseCode}, department = #{department}, template_schema = #{templateSchema, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, version_no = #{versionNo}, created_by = #{createdBy} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
